notes.sg-intensive-care-medicine: Intensive care medicine is a broader field that may encompass cardiology but is not a subfield of cardiology itself. Cardiology is a subspecialty of internal medicine.
notes.sg-environmental-health: Environmental health is a distinct field and not a subfield of cardiology. While environmental factors can impact cardiovascular health, the label itself does not represent a cardiology research topic.
notes.sg-randomized-controlled-trial: Randomized controlled trial is a research methodology, not a research topic within cardiology.
notes.sg-confidence-interval: Confidence interval is a statistical concept, not a research topic within cardiology.
notes.sg-hazard-ratio: Hazard ratio is a statistical measure used in survival analysis, not a research topic within cardiology.
